scenario: S11 Cantonese 粵語白話 + Traditional script — re-run with Triage v2 active (Meta v1)
verdict_basis: 5/8 slots covered after 6 turns (job, memory, first_run, robustness, acceptance), session NOT terminated, confidence climbing 0.10 -> 0.75. Triage v2 (sha 1078d6ba) successfully classified all 6 colloquial Cantonese answers as 'relevant'. The W5.2 baseline FAIL mode (predicate_double_fail at T2-T3 with termination_reason=user_input_unparseable_no_spec and 1/8 slots) is fully eliminated. Exceeds the ≥4-slot bar for TRIAGE-V2-FIX-CONFIRMED.

layer_split_verdict.meta_v1: UNCHANGED — meta prompt was not touched in this run.
layer_split_verdict.triage_v2: DECISIVE FIX — every one of T1..T6 (all Cantonese-particle-heavy) was triaged 'relevant'. The T2 anchor turn and T3 memory turn, which BOTH triggered W5.2 termination via two consecutive non_relevant classifications, are both 'relevant' under v2. The classifier no longer mistakes 咪就係/嘅/嘢/俾啲/冇/唔使 for off-topic gibberish.
layer_split_verdict.attribution: The improvement is attributable to triage v2 in isolation: Cantonese-particle tolerance examples (F8) in the triage prompt are the only delta vs W5.2. The session reached 5 covered slots vs W5.2's 1 covered slot, a +4 slot delta with no other variable changed.

particles_explicitly_called_out_in_succe.咪就係: ACCEPTED in T2 and T6 — both relevant
particles_explicitly_called_out_in_succe.嘅: ACCEPTED in T1, T2, T3, T4 — all relevant
particles_explicitly_called_out_in_succe.嘢: ACCEPTED in T3 (搞咁多嘢) — relevant

cantonese_particles_accepted.summary: All six W5.2-failure-attributed particles flipped from non_relevant (W5.2 v1) to relevant (M7 v2). 6/6 hit rate.

covered_slots_trajectory.note: bootstrap default seed; not a real user-input cover

covered_slots_trajectory.delta: anchor NOT flipped, but turn accepted as relevant (W5.2 rejected here)

anchor_slot_anomaly.observation: T2 ('錨點咪就係每日埋數個陣嘅總和囉。') was triaged relevant and the engine emitted a Q3 that explicitly acknowledged the anchor semantics ('我理解你說的『錨點』是每日結算時的總和'), but the anchor slot was NOT moved to covered_slots and confidence DROPPED 0.30 -> 0.15. This is a downstream slot-extraction issue, NOT a triage issue. Triage v2 correctly classified the answer as relevant; the per-slot extractor failed to bind '錨點 = 每日埋數總和' to the anchor slot key.
anchor_slot_anomaly.implication_for_F8: Triage v2 (F8) is doing its job. The remaining anchor-slot gap is a separate surface — either the extraction prompt schema or the slot-mapping post-processor. Out of scope for this re-run.
anchor_slot_anomaly.scope_slot_also_open: scope slot was never solicited (engine prioritized memory/first_run/robustness/acceptance/mirror path). Not attributable to triage.

transient_500s.T3_attempt1: HTTP 500 shellout_failed (llm complete ok=false, content=empty). Retry succeeded HTTP 200. Recorded as turn_03_attempt1_500.json.
transient_500s.T4_attempt1: HTTP 500 shellout_failed (same shape). Retry succeeded HTTP 200. Recorded as turn_04_attempt1_500.json.
transient_500s.interpretation: Upstream LLM (SiliconFlow) transient empty-completion failures, not triage misbehaviour. Same failure shape documented in prior F4/F6 evidence. Both retries succeeded on the FIRST retry with identical request body, confirming triage v2 produced no parse-poisoning side-effect.

w5_2_v1_baseline.trigger: T2 anchor non_relevant + T3 memory non_relevant -> non_relevant_count >= 2 abort

delta.root_cause_resolution: D26 'triage Cantonese particles' fully resolved by F8 explicit Cantonese tolerance examples

what_v2_did_not_fix: anchor slot extraction (triage said relevant, extractor still failed to bind '錨點 = 每日埋數總和')
scope slot solicitation order (engine never asked scope explicitly)

narrative: Two-way A/B: with Meta held at v1 and only Triage swapped to v2 (sha 1078d6ba), the S11 Cantonese FAIL pattern from W5.2 is fully eliminated. W5.2 terminated at T3 with 1/8 slot coverage (predicate_double_fail driven by triage misclassifying colloquial Cantonese particles as off-topic gibberish). M7 reaches T6 alive with 5/8 slot coverage, confidence climbing 0.10 -> 0.75, and 6/6 of the previously-rejection-implicated particles (咪就係/嘅/嘢/俾啲/冇/唔使) are now triaged 'relevant'. The remaining 3 open slots (anchor, scope, mirror) are NOT triage failures — anchor in particular was correctly triaged relevant at T2 (engine quoted '我理解你說的「錨點」是每日結算時的總和' in Q3) but the slot-extraction layer did not bind the answer to the anchor key. That is a separate downstream surface and is out of scope for F8 attribution. Net: F8 (triage v2 Cantonese tolerance examples) is the right fix and it works in isolation against W5.2's repro corpus. The Hong Kong-Cantonese user who could not complete a single driven-grill session under v1 can now complete 5 of 8 slots without termination under v2.
